title: Quill of Origin
description: A 1.16.5 Fabric Origins addon that allows logging chat into special books
body:
This simple mod adds the `quilloforigin:scribe` power type. Players with this power that have `quilloforigin:chat_book` items in their inventory (by default only for one of the hands) will have chat messages logged into the book.

The book has no recipe by default, datapacks are supposed to handle adding it.

Which messages and areas of the inventory are targeted can be configured in the power. For more information, check out [the wiki](https://github.com/Alluysl/quill-of-origin/wiki).

Translated in English and French.
